titleStmt.title: SII 34.268: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 268. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: A kaikkōḷa, Kuraṅgan Uḍaiyān alias Rājagambhīra-mārāyan, living in the temple street sold part of his land to the temple for 6000 kāsu to pay off the fine imposed on him (for some offence) by Bhuvanasiṅgadēvaṉ a mudali of Nāyaṉār Ēmappiḷḷaiyār (or Chēmappiḷḷaiyār) and deposited the amount in the treasury of the latter. The amount was used by the chief for making a sacred grove named after himself. Actually the temple also permitted the chief to use the above land of the kaikkōḷa for making the grove.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvīrapāṇṭiya tEvaṟkku yāṇṭu 4vatu Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu vallai nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭai
ya nāyaṉā Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvaṟkku Innāyaṉār tirumaṭaiviḷākattu kaikkōḷaril kuraṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa Irājagampīra mārāyaṉēn piramā
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu nāyaṉā Ēmappiḷḷaiyār mutalikaḷil puvaṉaciṅka tēvar Eṉṉaik kuṟṟa teṇṭattukku niccayitta kācu Eṉ kāṇiyā
ṉa Ācāriyaṉ vayalil Eṉ kūṟu cempātiyum mēṟkkuḷattu Uḷ nāṉ vilaikoṇṭu Uṭaiya nilamum Inta Ācāriyaṉ vayalukku mēṟkuḷḷa puṉce
mmaramum nāyaṉār tēvatāṉam teṉkaviranāṭaṉ kīḻvayalil tiruvuṇāḻikaikkōṉ pakkal nāṉvilai koṇṭu Uṭaiya nilamum Inta ceyyil kiṇaṟum In
ta Ōlai mēlppaṭṭa nīr nilattukkum kiṇaṟum puṉceyyum kiṇōkkiya kiṇaṟum mēṉōkkiya
maramum vilaikkuṟa viṟṟu koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ nalkācu 6 1000 Ikkācu Āṟāyiramum Innāyaṉār paṇṭārattilē kaikkoṇṭu
vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttēṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvaraṉkuḷamuṭaiya nāyaṉār Āticaṇṭēcśvaratē
vaṟkku kuraṅkaṉ Uṭaiyāṉāṉa Irājagampīra mārāyaṉēṉ Inta Ōlai mēṟppaṭṭa nīr nilaṅkaḷukkum pun ceykaḷum kīṇōkkiya kiṇaṟum mē
ṉōkkiya maramum Eppēṟpaṭṭatukkum Innāyaṉār cīpaṇṭārattilē koṇṭu Emmillicainta vilaipporuḷukku vilaikkuṟa viṟṟa kācu Āṟāyiramum vilai
kkuṟa viṟṟu poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu (vilaikkuṟa viṟṟup poruḷaṟakkoṇṭu) viṟṟu vilaippiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttēṉ Āticaṇṭēcura tēvaṟkku Irā
jakempīramārāyaṉēṉ Innilattukku cempilum kallilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu tiruccūlatēvaraiyum Eḻuntaruḷiviccuk koḷvarkaḷāka piramāṇam pa
ṇṇikkuṭuttēṉ Irājakempīra mārāyaṉēṉ Ippaṭikku Ivai Irācakempīra mārāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyāṉ kuraṅkaṉ cayiñaiyum Iṭṭu
Ivarkaḷ colla Ippiramāṇam Eḻutiṉēṉ tiruvaraṉkuḷa vēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippiramāṇattiṉ paṭiyilē nāyaṉār cēmapiḷḷaiyār paṇṭārattilē Ikkā
cu Āṟāyiramum cīpaṇṭāramāka kaikkoṇṭu nāyaṉār cēmappiḷḷaiyā r ceyvikkiṟa Aracakaṇṭarāmaṉ tiruttōppukku Ittiruttōppu ceykiṟa Aṭṭa�
perumāḷāṉa Aracakaṇṭarāmap piccaṟ tōppup puṟamākap piramāṇappaṭi tiriviṭṭuk kuṭuttōm Āticaṇṭēcura tēvakaṉmikaḷōm Ippaṭikku Ivai po
ṉmāḷikaip piḷḷaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumāḷikaippiḷḷai Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kiḷippayiṟṟu nāṭṭup paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumāḷikaipiḷḷai E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirumāḷikaippiḷḷai cayiññaiyum Iṭṭu Irā ṭaṉcayilē miṭṭu Eḻutiṉeṉ tiruvarankuḷavēḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cuntara
pperumāḷ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṟpatteṇṇāyiravaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirunāvukkaracu Āṇṭār Eḻuttu Ippaṭi tiruveḻucci Aḻakavar Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 34.268 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
